zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Mason於1518年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德爾時，她的父親George Mason27歲，母親Mrs George Mason24歲。她於1535年11月24日與William Walford在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1565年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾蕾托 德雷頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Mason于1518年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾米德爾时，她的父亲George Mason27岁，母亲Mrs George Mason24岁。她于1535年11月24日与William Walford在英国英格兰史洛普爾米德爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1565年在英国英格兰史洛普爾蕾托 德雷頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Mason was born in 1518, in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, George Mason, was 27 and her mother, Mrs George Mason, was 24. She married William Walford on 24 November 1535, in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1565, in Little Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Mason est née en 1518, à Myddle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Mason, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs George Mason, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Walford le 24 novembre 1535, à Myddle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1565, à Little Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

November 1535 in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom William Walford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Masonが1518年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアムイッドルで生まれた時，父George Masonは27歳，母Mrs George Masonは24歳であった。1535年11月24日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアムイッドルでWilliam Walfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1565年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアリットル ドレイトンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Mason(이)가 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마이들일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Mason(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs George Mason(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1535년 11월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마이들일에서 William Walford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 리틀 드라이턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.
